nasb.text: Then the one who burns them shall wash his clothes and bathe his body with water, then afterward he shall come into the camp.

esv.text: And he who burns them shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.

cnv.text: 那燒祭牲的人要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗身，然後才可以進營。

ccb.text: 负责焚烧的人要洗衣、沐浴，然后才可回到营里。
